description: Trigger SDK regeneration on @ama-sdk update with private registry support. arg0: package manager (yarn, npm). arg1: npm config file path (e.g. '.npmrc-renovate'). Only supported for npm and Yarn 1 via NPM_CONFIG_USERCONFIG; for Yarn 2+, configure hostRules instead (see https://docs.renovatebot.com/getting-started/private-packages/#yarn-2).
